Product.title: Product
Product.description: A product in the boutique inventory.

category.description: The category of the product (e.g., Ladies, Gents, Kids, Hangers, Others).

price.description: The price or price range of the product.

externalLink.description: An external link to more photos (e.g., Google Drive).

images.description: An array of image URLs (base64 or hosted) for the product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the product was created.

authorUID.description: The UID of the admin who created the product.

User.title: User
User.description: A user of the application, typically an admin.

email.description: The email address of the user.

products/{productId}.description: The collection of products in the inventory.
